name: PressPilot — Research & Draft

body.prompt:
=Research the keyword: "{{ $json.keyword }}"

Domain/niche: {{ $json.domain }}
Target audience: blog readers interested in {{ $json.domain }}

Provide a research brief with:
1. What searchers are actually looking for (search intent)
2. Key points to cover in the article
3. Common questions people have about this topic
4. 3-5 related keywords/LSI terms to include naturally
5. Suggested H2 headings (3-5)

Be specific and actionable. This will be used to write a blog post.
body.systemPrompt: You are a content strategist. Provide thorough, specific research briefs. No fluff.

body.prompt:
=Write a complete, SEO-optimized blog post for the keyword: "{{ $('Webhook Trigger').item.json.keyword }}"

Blog: {{ $('Webhook Trigger').item.json.domain }}
Recommended title: {{ $('Webhook Trigger').item.json.recommended_title }}

Research brief:
{{ $json.text }}

Requirements:
- Write in Markdown format
- Start with a compelling introduction (no H1 — Ghost adds the title)
- Use H2 and H3 headings
- Target length: 1200-1800 words
- Include the primary keyword naturally in first 100 words, 2-3 times throughout
- End with a clear conclusion and call-to-action
- Tone: helpful, clear, practical (not clickbait)
- Include a meta description (150-160 chars) at the TOP of the response in this format:
META: <your meta description here>
---
<post body>
body.systemPrompt: You are an expert blog writer. Write engaging, helpful content that ranks well and serves readers. Always include the META: line first.

nodes.name: Create Ghost Draft
nodes.notes: POSTs the draft to Ghost Admin API. Requires Ghost Admin API key in ghostKey field.

notes: Triggered by keyword-scoring workflow (or manually). Does research → draft → Ghost API → Telegram notification. Requires: provider-layer running, Ghost Admin API key in env, Telegram bot token.
